itinerary.destination: Grand Canyon National Park, South Rim

rows.title: Rest and Explore Grand Canyon Village
rows.notes: After checking in, take a leisurely walk around Grand Canyon Village to get a feel for the area. Visit the Visitor Center for maps and tips.

rows.title: Dinner at the El Tovar Dining Room
rows.notes: Enjoy a meal at the historic El Tovar Dining Room, known for its classic cuisine with a scenic view.

rows.title: Stargazing at Yavapai Point
rows.notes: Watch the stars over the canyon. Find a spot slightly below the main overlook for less light pollution and a quieter experience.

rows.title: Sunrise at Mather Point
rows.notes: Position yourself on the eastern side of Mather Point for a uniquely framed view of the first light illuminating O'Neill Butte.

rows.title: Breakfast at Bright Angel Lodge Restaurant
rows.notes: Enjoy a hearty breakfast with canyon views.

rows.title: Travel to South Kaibab Trailhead
rows.notes: Short shuttle ride to the South Kaibab Trailhead.

rows.title: Venture Down the South Kaibab Trail
rows.notes: Pause at the outcrop halfway to Cedar Ridge to glimpse O'Neill Butte silhouetted against the Painted Desert.

rows.title: Return to Grand Canyon Village
rows.notes: Take the shuttle back to the village for lunch.

rows.title: Lunch at Maswik Food Court
rows.notes: Enjoy a quick meal at the food court with various options.

rows.title: Leisurely Walk on the Rim Trail
rows.notes: Begin at Maricopa Point and enjoy the vibrant rock formations in the afternoon sun.

rows.title: Dinner at Arizona Steakhouse
rows.notes: Taste southwestern cuisine with a beautiful view of the canyon.

rows.title: Sunset at Yavapai Point
rows.notes: Position yourself below the main overlook on the unpaved path for a sweeping view of color shifts.

rows.title: Wildlife Observation near Yaki Point
rows.notes: Watch for condors on the southeast part by the juniper tree. Best seen in the early morning.

rows.title: Breakfast at Canyon Coffee House
rows.notes: Relax and enjoy breakfast before heading out for more exploration.

rows.title: Travel to Desert View Watchtower
rows.notes: Drive to the east and explore this iconic viewpoint.

rows.title: Desert View Watchtower
rows.notes: Stand at the base of the west side as sunlight casts shadows, offering beautiful canyon details.

rows.title: Lunch at Yavapai Lodge Restaurant
rows.notes: Enjoy casual dining with a view after visiting the watchtower.

rows.title: Travel to Yavapai Geological Museum
rows.notes: Short drive back towards the village to explore the museum.

rows.title: Yavapai Geological Museum
rows.notes: Position yourself at the north-facing windows during early afternoon for vibrant rock hues.

rows.title: Dinner at the Canyon Village Market & Deli
rows.notes: Casual dining with a wide range of options located centrally in the village.

rows.title: Travel to Hopi Point
rows.notes: Short shuttle ride to Hopi Point for sunset viewing.

rows.title: Vistas at Hopi Point
rows.notes: Position yourself near the West Rim Trail sign for the perfect sunset shot over the North Rim.

rows.title: Breakfast at the Bright Angel Lodge Restaurant
rows.notes: Fuel up for the day's adventures with a hearty breakfast.

rows.title: Travel to Bright Angel Trailhead
rows.notes: Walk from the lodge to the trailhead.

rows.title: Hiking the Bright Angel Trail
rows.notes: Look out for the side trail past Mile-and-a-Half Resthouse for an unobstructed panorama of Indian Garden.

rows.title: Lunch at Harvey House Café
rows.notes: Enjoy lunch back at the rim after a morning hike.

rows.title: Travel to Grand Canyon Airport
rows.notes: Drive to the airport for the helicopter tour.

rows.title: Helicopter Tour Over the Grand Canyon
rows.notes: Request the flight path to view the confluence of the Little Colorado and Colorado Rivers.

rows.title: Return to Grand Canyon Village
rows.notes: Drive back to the village post-tour.

rows.title: Rest and Relax in Grand Canyon Village
rows.notes: Take some leisure time to rest and explore at your own pace.

rows.title: Dinner at El Tovar Dining Room
rows.notes: Cap off the day with fine dining and a beautiful sunset view.

rows.title: Breakfast at Maswik Lodge Cafeteria
rows.notes: Start your day with a simple breakfast before heading out.

rows.title: Travel to Tusayan Ruin and Museum
rows.notes: Drive to the museum to explore local history.

rows.title: Tusayan Ruin and Museum
rows.notes: Listen for the distinctive echo in the sandstone room block when you clap your hands softly.

rows.title: Lunch at Arizona Steakhouse
rows.notes: Enjoy a meal with a picturesque view before the afternoon activities.

rows.title: Travel to Grandview Point Overlook
rows.notes: Short drive to Grandview Point for scenic vistas.

rows.title: Grandview Point Overlook
rows.notes: Follow the left path past the main viewpoint to find the rock bench for an unobstructed panorama shot.

rows.title: Return to Visitor Center
rows.notes: Drive back to the visitor center for the afternoon events.

rows.title: Hualapai Tribal Tour
rows.notes: Look southwest at the Hilltop for the shaman's rock silhouette. Enjoy the cultural tour with local guides.

rows.title: Dinner at Bright Angel Lodge
rows.notes: End the day with a cozy meal at the Lodge.

rows.title: Breakfast at Maswik Lodge Cafeteria
rows.notes: A final breakfast before packing for departure.

rows.title: Packing and Relaxation Time
rows.notes: Ensure everything is packed and take a final moment to relax and reflect on the journey.

rows.title: Check-out and Travel to Departure Point
rows.notes: Check out from accommodation and travel to the departure point with sufficient buffer for transit time.
